text: "They indeed desiring food"... He means the Egyptians; who were restrained even from that food which was necessary, by the frogs and the flies that were sent amongst them, and spoiled all their meats.—But these. The Israelites.
"Sign of salvation."... The brazen serpent, an emblem of Christ our Savior.
"The fire had more force"... When the fire and hail mingled together laid waste the land of Egypt (Ex. 9).
